pages.text: html, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; } /* Extra small devices (phones, 600px and down) */ @media only screen and (max-width: 600px) { .left { width: 320px; } .left .a { text-align: center; width: auto; position: relative; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; } .right { width: 320px; } .bottom { width: 320px; } } /* Small devices (portrait tablets and large phones, 600px and up) */ @media only screen and (min-width: 600px) { .left { width: 600px; } .left .a { text-align: center; width: auto; position: relative; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; } .right { text-align: center; width: 320px; position: relative; left: 140px; right: 460px; } .bottom { width: 600px; } } /* Medium devices (landscape tablets, 768px and up) */ @media only screen and (min-width: 768px) { .left { width: 768px; } .left .a { text-align: center; width: auto; position: relative; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; } .right { text-align: center; width: 320px; position: relative; left: 224px; right: 224px; } .bottom { width: 768px; } } /* Large devices (laptops/desktops, 992px and up) */ @media only screen and (min-width: 992px) { .left { float: left; width: 600px; } .left .a { text-align: center; width: auto; position: relative; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; } .right { margin-left: 500px; width: 320px; } .bottom { width: 1200px; } } /* Extra large devices (large laptops and desktops, 1200px and up) */ @media only screen and (min-width: 1200px) { .left { float: left; width: 600px; } .left .a { text-align: center; width: auto; position: relative; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; } .right { margin-left: 500px; width: 320px; } .bottom { width: 1200px; } } Binggui Zhou (周炳貴) received the B.Eng. degree in Electrical Engineering from Jinan University, Zhuhai, China, in 2018, and the M.Sc. degree in Electrical and Computer Engineering from the University of Macau, Macao SAR, China, in 2021, respectively. He is currently working toward the Ph.D. degree in Electrical and Computer Engineering with the State Key Laboratory of Internet of Things for Smart City (SKL-IOTSC) and Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering, University of Macau, Macao SAR, China. He also serves as a Research Assistant with the School of Intelligent Systems Science and Engineering, Jinan University, Zhuhai, China. His research interests include Artificial Intelligence, Intelligent Wireless Communications, and Spatial-Temporal Data Mining.                         News [2023-08-02] One paper has been accepted by Neurocomputing. [2023-06-21] Our paper Natural Language Processing for Smart Healthcare is selected as a Featured Article of IEEE Reviews in Biomedical Engineering (IF 17.6). [2023-05-17] Binggui Zhou, Kehui Li, Chengzhi Ma, Chengwang Ji, and Prof. Shaodan Ma won the Winning Prize of the First 6G Intelligent Wireless Communication System Competition held by the IMT-2030 (6G) Promotion Group and Guangdong OPPO Mobile Communications Corp., Ltd. [2023-01-04] One paper has been accepted by Knowledge-Based Systems. [2022-09-22] One paper has been accepted by IEEE Reviews in Biomedical Engineering. [2022-04-24] Binggui Zhou and Prof. Shaodan Ma won the Silver Prize of the First 6G AI Competition held by the Guangdong OPPO Mobile Communications Corp., Ltd. [2022-03-03] One paper has been accepted by Applied Soft Computing.

I’m currently a Ph.D. student in Electrical and Computer Engineering (ECE) with the SKL-IOTSC and Department of ECE, University of Macau, Macao SAR, China; and also a Research Assistant with the SISSE, Jinan University, Zhuhai, China. I’m co-supervised by Prof. Shaodan Ma (SMIEEE, Associate Director of SKL-IOTSC) and Prof. Guanghua Yang (FIET, SMIEEE, Associate Dean of SISSE). Previously, I obtained my Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical Engineering (EE) from Jinan University, Zhuhai, China and Master of Science in ECE from University of Macau, Macao SAR, China. My research interests include Intelligent Wireless Communications, Spatial-Temporal Data Mining, Natural Language Processing, Generative Artificial Intelligence, and Smart Healthcare. I also collaborate closely with Prof. Xi Yang (Professor, East China Normal University) on Intelligent Wireless Communications, and with Prof. Yunxuan Dong (Assistant Professor, Guangxi University) on Spatial-Temporal Data Mining. Contact Email: binggui.zhou@connect.um.edu.mo Address: Room 5004, Building N21, University of Macau, Avenida da Universidade, Taipa, Macao SAR, China Education [Aug. 2021 - present] Doctor of Philosophy in Electrical and Computer Engineering, University of Macau [Aug. 2018 - Jun. 2021] Master of Science in Electrical and Computer Engineering, University of Macau [Sep. 2014 - Jun. 2018] Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical Engineering, Jinan University Professional Experience [Jul. 2019 - present] Research Assistant, School of Intelligent Systems Science and Engineering, Jinan University Academic Services Journal Referee IEEE Internet of Things Journal (IOT-J) IEEE IEEE Transactions on Cognitive Communications and Networking (TCCN) IEEE Wireless Communication Letters (WCL) Computer Methods in Biomechanics and Biomedical Engineering Conference Reviewer IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC) IEEE/CIC International Conference on Communications in China (ICCC) Asia-Pacific Conference on Communications (APCC) International Conference on Artificial Intelligence of Things and Systems (AIoTSys) Honors and Awards [2023] Wining Prize of the First 6G Intelligent Wireless Communication System Competition (Captain, Rank 9/1252 teams) [2022] Silver Prize of the First 6G AI Competition (Captain, Rank 2/727 teams) [2018] The 2nd Prize of the ASC Student Supercomputer Challenge (Captain) [2017] National Encouragement Scholarship [2016] National Encouragement Scholarship [2015] National Encouragement Scholarship

Research Interests Artificial Intelligence: Spatial-temporal Data Mining, Natural Language Processing, Generative Artificial Intelligence Intelligent Communications: Channel Estimation, CSI Feedback, Channel Modeling, Massive MIMO Smart Healthcare: Artifical Intelligence and Wireless Communications for Smart Healthcare Research Highlights Intelligent Communications Check out Our Solution to the First 6G AI Competition held by the Guangdong OPPO Mobile Communications Corp., Ltd, which won the Silver Prize and ranked No. 2 over 727 teams. Smart Healthcare Natural Language Processing for Smart Healthcare by Binggui Zhou, Guanghua Yang, Zheng Shi, and Shaodan Ma, published in IEEE Reviews in Biomedical Engineering (IF 17.6). This paper is selected as a Featured Article of IEEE Reviews in Biomedical Engineering 2023. In smart healthcare, natural language processing (NLP) techniques are highly demanded to analyze and understand human language for various smart applications across various healthcare scenarios. In this work, we review existing studies that concern NLP for smart healthcare from the perspectives of technique and application. We first elaborate on different NLP approaches and the NLP pipeline for smart healthcare from the technical point of view. Then, in the context of smart healthcare applications employing NLP techniques, we introduce several representative smart healthcare scenarios. We further discuss two specific medical issues, i.e., the coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) pandemic and mental health, in which NLP-driven smart healthcare plays an important role. Finally, we discuss the limitations of current works and identify the directions for future works. Read More
